---
title: "Descriptive Analysis"
subtitle: "Suicide Structural Determinants - COVID-19 Pandemic"
author: "Tu nombre"
date: today
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Setup
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(gt)
library(countrycode)

# Cargar dataset analítico
dataset <- read_csv("../DATA/CLEAN/dataset_analitico_final.csv")

# Agregar región geográfica
dataset <- dataset %>%
  mutate(region = countrycode(iso3, 
                              origin = "iso3c", 
                              destination = "region"))

cat("Dataset cargado:", nrow(dataset), "países\n")
cat("Columnas:", names(dataset), "\n")
```

```{r}
## Tabla 1 — Características por grupo de ingreso

tabla1 <- dataset %>%
  filter(!is.na(income_group)) %>%
  mutate(income_group = factor(income_group, 
                               levels = c("Low income", 
                                          "Lower middle income",
                                          "Upper middle income", 
                                          "High income"))) %>%
  group_by(income_group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    rate_pre = paste0(round(median(rate_pre, na.rm=TRUE),1),
                      " (", round(quantile(rate_pre, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE),1),
                      "–", round(quantile(rate_pre, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE),1), ")"),
    rate_pandemic = paste0(round(median(rate_pandemic, na.rm=TRUE),1),
                           " (", round(quantile(rate_pandemic, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE),1),
                           "–", round(quantile(rate_pandemic, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE),1), ")"),
    delta = paste0(round(median(delta_suicide, na.rm=TRUE),2),
                   " (", round(quantile(delta_suicide, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE),2),
                   "–", round(quantile(delta_suicide, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE),2), ")"),
    psychiatrists = paste0(round(median(psychiatrists_unicef, na.rm=TRUE),2),
                           " (", round(quantile(psychiatrists_unicef, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE),2),
                           "–", round(quantile(psychiatrists_unicef, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE),2), ")"),
    uhc = paste0(round(median(uhc_index_mean, na.rm=TRUE),1),
                 " (", round(quantile(uhc_index_mean, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE),1),
                 "–", round(quantile(uhc_index_mean, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE),1), ")"),
    excess_covid = paste0(round(median(excess_mortality_per_100k, na.rm=TRUE),1),
                          " (", round(quantile(excess_mortality_per_100k, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE),1),
                          "–", round(quantile(excess_mortality_per_100k, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE),1), ")"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

kw_pvals <- tibble(
  income_group = "p-value (K-W)",
  n = NA_character_,
  rate_pre = ifelse(kruskal.test(rate_pre ~ income_group, data=dataset)$p.value < 0.001,
                    "<0.001", as.character(round(kruskal.test(rate_pre ~ income_group, data=dataset)$p.value, 3))),
  rate_pandemic = ifelse(kruskal.test(rate_pandemic ~ income_group, data=dataset)$p.value < 0.001,
                         "<0.001", as.character(round(kruskal.test(rate_pandemic ~ income_group, data=dataset)$p.value, 3))),
  delta = ifelse(kruskal.test(delta_suicide ~ income_group, data=dataset)$p.value < 0.001,
                 "<0.001", as.character(round(kruskal.test(delta_suicide ~ income_group, data=dataset)$p.value, 3))),
  psychiatrists = ifelse(kruskal.test(psychiatrists_unicef ~ income_group, data=dataset)$p.value < 0.001,
                         "<0.001", as.character(round(kruskal.test(psychiatrists_unicef ~ income_group, data=dataset)$p.value, 3))),
  uhc = ifelse(kruskal.test(uhc_index_mean ~ income_group, data=dataset)$p.value < 0.001,
               "<0.001", as.character(round(kruskal.test(uhc_index_mean ~ income_group, data=dataset)$p.value, 3))),
  excess_covid = ifelse(kruskal.test(excess_mortality_per_100k ~ income_group, data=dataset)$p.value < 0.001,
                        "<0.001", as.character(round(kruskal.test(excess_mortality_per_100k ~ income_group, data=dataset)$p.value, 3)))
)

# También convertir n a character en tabla1
tabla1 <- tabla1 %>%
  mutate(n = as.character(n))

tabla1_final <- bind_rows(tabla1, kw_pvals)
tabla1_final <- tabla1_final %>%
  mutate(n = ifelse(is.na(n), "—", n))
## Mostrar Tabla 1

tabla1_final %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**Table 1. Suicide mortality rates and structural indicators by income group**")
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    income_group = "Income group",
    n = "N",
    rate_pre = "Pre-pandemic rate",
    rate_pandemic = "Pandemic rate",
    delta = "Delta (Δ)",
    psychiatrists = "Psychiatrists/100k",
    uhc = "UHC index",
    excess_covid = "Excess mortality/100k"
  ) %>%
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = md("*Note.* Values expressed as median (Q1–Q3). Suicide rates per 100,000 population, age-standardized. The bottom row shows p-values from Kruskal–Wallis tests.")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = income_group == "p-value (K-W)")
  ) %>%
  cols_align(align = "center")
```
```{r}
## Guardar Tabla 1 como imagen

# Instalar webshot2 si no lo tienes
# install.packages("webshot2")

library(webshot2)

tabla1_final %>%
  mutate(n = ifelse(is.na(n), "—", n)) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**Table 1. Suicide mortality rates and structural indicators by income group**")
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    income_group = "Income group",
    n = "N",
    rate_pre = "Pre-pandemic rate",
    rate_pandemic = "Pandemic rate",
    delta = "Delta (Δ)",
    psychiatrists = "Psychiatrists/100k",
    uhc = "UHC index",
    excess_covid = "Excess mortality/100k"
  ) %>%
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = md("*Note.* Values expressed as median (Q1–Q3). Suicide rates per 100,000 population, age-standardized. The bottom row shows p-values from Kruskal–Wallis tests.")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = income_group == "p-value (K-W)")
  ) %>%
  cols_align(align = "center") %>%
  gtsave("../OUTPUTS/Table1_suicide_structural_indicators.png",
         zoom = 2,
         expand = 10)

cat("Tabla guardada en OUTPUTS/\n")
```
```{r}
tabla1_final %>%
  mutate(n = ifelse(is.na(n), "—", n)) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**Table 1.** Suicide mortality rates and structural indicators by income group")
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    income_group = "Income group",
    n = "N",
    rate_pre = "Pre-pandemic rate",
    rate_pandemic = "Pandemic rate",
    delta = "Delta (Δ)",
    psychiatrists = "Psychiatrists/100k",
    uhc = "UHC index",
    excess_covid = "Excess mortality/100k"
  ) %>%
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = md("*Note.* Values expressed as median (Q1–Q3). Suicide rates per 100,000 population, age-standardized. The bottom row shows p-values from Kruskal–Wallis tests.")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = income_group == "p-value (K-W)")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels()
  ) %>%
  tab_options(
    table.border.top.style = "solid",
    table.border.top.width = px(2),
    table.border.bottom.style = "solid",
    table.border.bottom.width = px(2),
    column_labels.border.bottom.style = "solid",
    column_labels.border.bottom.width = px(1),
    table_body.hlines.style = "none",  # sin líneas horizontales internas
    table.font.size = px(12),
    data_row.padding = px(6)
  ) %>%
  cols_align(align = "center", columns = -income_group) %>%
  cols_align(align = "left", columns = income_group) %>%
  gtsave("../OUTPUTS/Table1_suicide_structural_indicators.png",
         zoom = 2, expand = 10)
```
```{r}
## Verificación de normalidad — variables principales

library(ggplot2)

# Histogramas de las variables clave
variables <- c("delta_suicide", "psychiatrists_unicef", 
                "uhc_index_mean", "excess_mortality_per_100k",
                "rate_pre", "rate_pandemic")

par(mfrow = c(2, 3))

for(var in variables) {
  hist(dataset[[var]], 
       main = var, 
       xlab = var,
       col = "steelblue",
       border = "white")
}

# Test de Kolmogorov-Smirnov para cada variable
cat("=== Kolmogorov-Smirnov Normality Tests ===\n")
for(var in variables) {
  datos <- dataset[[var]][!is.na(dataset[[var]])]
  test <- ks.test(datos, "pnorm", 
                  mean(datos), 
                  sd(datos))
  cat(var, "→ p-value:", round(test$p.value, 4), 
      ifelse(test$p.value < 0.05, "→ NO normal ✗", 
             "→ Normal ✓"), "\n")
}
```
```{r}
cat("=== Shapiro-Wilk Normality Tests ===\n")
for(var in variables) {
  datos <- dataset[[var]][!is.na(dataset[[var]])]
  # Shapiro-Wilk requiere entre 3 y 5000 observaciones
  test <- shapiro.test(datos)
  cat(var, "→ p-value:", round(test$p.value, 4), 
      ifelse(test$p.value < 0.05, "→ NO normal ✗", 
             "→ Normal ✓"), "\n")
}
```
